summary: Iteration 46: Auto Gunny Bag Entries from Mill Entries - All 16 backend tests PASSED. New feature verified: g_issued creates OUT entry, g_deposite creates IN entry in gunny_bags with linked_entry_id. Update/Delete mill entries properly sync gunny entries. PDF/Excel exports still working.
critical_code_review_comments: entries.py L136-160: _create_gunny_entries_for_mill helper properly creates OUT for g_issued and IN for g_deposite
entries.py L141: Source format 'agent_name - mandi_name' implemented correctly
entries.py L153: Reference set to truck_no correctly
entries.py L131: create_entry calls _create_gunny_entries_for_mill after insert
entries.py L538-539: update_entry deletes old gunny entries and recreates new ones
entries.py L563: delete_entry cleans up linked gunny entries via db.gunny_bags.delete_many({linked_entry_id: entry_id})
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST-GUNNY-* prefix, auto-cleaned after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto gunny bag creation from mill entries fully working. Key fields: linked_entry_id links auto-created gunny entries to source mill entry. Source format is 'Agent - Mandi'. Reference is truck_no. Bag_type='new', rate=0, amount=0, notes='Auto from Mill Entry' for auto entries.

auto_gunny_from_mill_entry.test_01_g_issued_creates_out: PASSED - g_issued=50 creates OUT entry with qty=50
auto_gunny_from_mill_entry.test_02_g_deposite_creates_in: PASSED - g_deposite=30 creates IN entry with qty=30
auto_gunny_from_mill_entry.test_04_update_replaces_entries: PASSED - Update deletes old and creates new gunny entries
auto_gunny_from_mill_entry.test_05_delete_removes_linked: PASSED - Delete mill entry removes linked gunny entries
auto_gunny_from_mill_entry.test_06_zero_values_no_entries: PASSED - g_issued=0 and g_deposite=0 creates no entries
